attributes.description: Dashboard providing overview of identity detections from the RecordedFuture integration.

params.markdown:
This dashboard provides an overview of identity exposure detections collected by the Recorded Future integration.

The dashboard highlights trends in detections over time, with metrics for total and novel detections. It features donut charts breaking down detections by detection type and source type, bar charts for top malware families and targeted domains, a table of top targeted authorization technologies, a metric for detections with unexpired cookies, a breakdown of detections by country, and a recent detections table for triage.

[**Integration Page**](/app/integrations/detail/ti_recordedfuture/overview)

attributes.title: [Logs RecordedFuture] Identity Detections
